'''yafupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hubbleshow|hubbleshow]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hubbleshow|hubbleshow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yafupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæfipith|yæfipith]] || [[word:yæfipij|yæfipij]] || [[word:yæfipish|yæfipish]] || [[word:yæfipi|yæfipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yafufuputh|yafufuputh]] || [[word:yafufupuj|yafufupuj]] || [[word:yafufupush|yafufupush]] || [[word:yafufupu|yafufupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yafuputh|yafuputh]] || [[word:yafupuj|yafupuj]] || [[word:yafupush|yafupush]] || [[word:yafupu|yafupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yafufpufth|yafufpufth]] || [[word:yafufpufj|yafufpufj]] || [[word:yafufpufsh|yafufpufsh]] || [[word:yafufpuf|yafufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yafuputhu|yafuputhu]] || [[word:yafupuju|yafupuju]] || [[word:yafupushu|yafupushu]] || [[word:yafupuku|yafupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yafuputh|yafuputh]] || [[word:yafupuj|yafupuj]] || [[word:yafupush|yafupush]] || [[word:yafupu|yafupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yafuputhul|yafuputhul]] || [[word:yafupujul|yafupujul]] || [[word:yafupushul|yafupushul]] || [[word:yafupukul|yafupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yafupuuthuthu|yafupuuthuthu]] || [[word:yafupuujuju|yafupuujuju]] || [[word:yafupuushushu|yafupuushushu]] || [[word:yafupuuku|yafupuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yafuputhun|yafuputhun]] || [[word:yafupujun|yafupujun]] || [[word:yafupushun|yafupushun]] || [[word:yafupukun|yafupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yafuputhuoro|yafuputhuoro]] || [[word:yafupujuoro|yafupujuoro]] || [[word:yafupushuoro|yafupushuoro]] || [[word:yafupukuoro|yafupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
